holdings.infoBox: METL is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nucor stock at 4.57%, Lithium Argentina AG at 4.36%, Hudbay Minerals at 4.24%, Steel Dynamics at 4.06%, and Major Drilling Group International at 3.99%.

overview.description: The Sprott Active Metals & Miners ETF (METL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund broadly invests in companies with exposure to high-demand metals and raw materials. The actively managed ETF selects undervalued companies from around the world across the metals and mining industry lifecycle. METL was launched on Sep 9, 2025 and is issued by Sprott.
